efb7147fd667.question: what is the minimum risk score
efb7147fd667.corrected_sql: SELECT MIN(CAST(members.RISK_SCORE AS REAL)) AS min_risk_score FROM members
violations: TABLE_MISMATCH: Question asks about 'members' but SQL queries {'claims'}
AGGREGATION_MISMATCH: Question implies MIN but SQL uses MAX

840ddccf25bd.question: claims by status
840ddccf25bd.corrected_sql: SELECT claims.CLAIM_STATUS, SUM(CAST(claims.PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) AS sum_paid_amount FROM claims GROUP BY claims.CLAIM_STATUS ORDER BY sum_paid_amount DESC LIMIT 100
violations: GROUP_BY_MISSING: Question asks to group 'by status' but SQL has no GROUP BY clause
corrections: Added GROUP BY CLAIM_STATUS for 'by status' intent

844ffb2ce47e.question: average billed amount by region
844ffb2ce47e.corrected_sql: SELECT claims.KP_REGION, AVG(CAST(claims.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) AS avg_billed_amount FROM claims GROUP BY claims.KP_REGION ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 100
violations: GROUP_BY_MISSING: Question asks to group 'by region' but SQL has no GROUP BY clause
corrections: Added GROUP BY KP_REGION for 'by region' intent

e9603d5e2078.question: total cost by drug class
e9603d5e2078.corrected_sql: SELECT prescriptions.DRUG_CLASS, SUM(CAST(prescriptions.COST AS REAL)) AS sum_cost FROM prescriptions GROUP BY prescriptions.DRUG_CLASS ORDER BY sum_cost DESC LIMIT 100
violations: GROUP_BY_MISSING: Question asks to group 'by drug class' but SQL has no GROUP BY clause
corrections: Added GROUP BY DRUG_CLASS for 'by drug class' intent

4da43481163b.question: average length of stay by department
4da43481163b.corrected_sql: SELECT encounters.DEPARTMENT, AVG(CAST(encounters.LENGTH_OF_STAY AS REAL)) AS avg_length_of_stay FROM encounters GROUP BY encounters.DEPARTMENT ORDER BY avg_length_of_stay DESC LIMIT 100
violations: GROUP_BY_MISSING: Question asks to group 'by department' but SQL has no GROUP BY clause
corrections: Added GROUP BY DEPARTMENT for 'by department' intent

4112c819c528.question: encounters by status
4112c819c528.corrected_sql: SELECT encounters.ENCOUNTER_STATUS, COUNT(*) AS total FROM encounters GROUP BY encounters.ENCOUNTER_STATUS ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 100
violations: GROUP_BY_MISSING: Question asks to group 'by status' but SQL has no GROUP BY clause
corrections: Added GROUP BY ENCOUNTER_STATUS for 'by status' intent
